title: Idaho
excerpt:
Consumer Assistance in Idaho

Contact your state department of insurance to get consumer help with a health insurance problem or question.

Medicaid in Idaho

You can apply for Medicaid in Idaho by contacting your state Medicaid agency.

SHOP Health Insurance Marketplace® in Idaho

If your small business is located in Idaho, you can use the Your Health Idaho website to learn more about offering your employees health coverage.

SHOP Health Insurance Marketplace® for Employees in Idaho

If your employer offers SHOP health coverage in Idaho, you should contact your employer or visit the Your Health Idaho website for more information.

Health Insurance Marketplace® in Idaho

If you live in Idaho, you’ll use the Your Health Idaho website to enroll in health coverage.

CHIP in Idaho

Idaho CHIP covers uninsured children in families with moderate incomes that are too high to qualify for Medicaid. You can find out whether your children qualify for Idaho CHIP right now. Fill out a Marketplace application and find out whether your children qualify. Learn more about the Idaho CHIP.
